overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk commercial district from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera follows a character through neon-lit covered arcades and tree-lined pedestrian streets filled with holographic advertisements, food vendors, and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered commercial promenade with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wide commercial arcade toward the distant archway

entered.detail: large curved wall covered with animated holographic advertisements and brand displays
row of food kiosks with neon trim and digital menu displays
illuminated archway structure marking the end of the promenade
high covered ceiling with integrated lighting and structural beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, covered commercial promenade bathed in neon light. Large holographic billboards cover the left wall while food vendor stalls line the right. The camera moves forward through the spacious corridor toward a distant illuminated archway, with sparse pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit pedestrian corridor with overhead digital screens

events.description: turns right from wide promenade into narrower covered corridor with different lighting

agents.ego_description: turns right into a narrower corridor and continues walking past illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food counter with glowing menu displays

entered.detail: angular building edges outlined with bright yellow neon lighting
suspended digital displays showing advertisements above the walkway
large planter with trees visible ahead in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrower, more enclosed corridor defined by bright neon architectural trim and overhead digital screens. The space feels more intimate than the previous wide promenade, with tree planters becoming visible ahead and a food vendor visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian shopping street with ground-level storefronts

events.description: trees and planters become prominent features in the walkway, creating a more organic atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking through the tree-lined pedestrian area passing various pedestrians and ground-level shops

notable_agents.action: person in pink top standing near the pharmacy entrance
person in dark jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: illuminated green signage for a pharmacy storefront
overhead tree branches and leaves creating partial cover
mobile food cart with vendor preparing items
ground-level shop windows with illuminated interiors

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a tree-lined pedestrian street with moderate foot traffic. A pharmacy sign is visible on the left while the path continues under a canopy of trees. The camera passes by a food vendor cart and various pedestrians, with ground-level storefronts replacing the earlier overhead billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit commercial promenade into a more intimate, tree-lined pedestrian street. It begins by gliding through a spacious covered corridor where large holographic billboards on the left contrast with food vendor stalls on the right. As the camera approaches a distant illuminated archway, it turns right into a narrower enclosed passage defined by bright neon architectural trim and overhead digital screens. The scene then opens into an outdoor pedestrian area where the overhead billboards are replaced by ground-level storefronts and a canopy of trees. Finally, the camera passes a pharmacy sign and various food carts, moving through a moderate flow of pedestrians under the soft glow of the city lights.
